intakeQuestions.label: AUTHORIZATION Q1: Authorize release of case-file information to the designated individual
APPLICATION DETAILS Q2: Applicant family name
APPLICATION DETAILS Q3: Applicant given name(s)
APPLICATION DETAILS Q4: Applicant date of birth
APPLICATION DETAILS Q5: Applicant client ID or unique client identifier (UCI)
APPLICATION DETAILS Q6: Name of office where application was submitted
APPLICATION DETAILS Q7: Address of office where application was submitted
APPLICATION DETAILS Q8: Type of application (permanent residence, study permit extension, etc.)
DESIGNATED INDIVIDUAL Q9: Name of firm or organization (if applicable)
DESIGNATED INDIVIDUAL Q19: Email address (if applicable)
